display.purpose: Hero headline only; exactly one per page.

label.purpose: Prices, stock counts, chat metadata. Never full sentences.

shadows.name: resting-card
shadows.purpose: Default card structure on light surfaces.

shadows.name: lifted
shadows.purpose: Hover state of interactive cards, paired with -translate-y.

shadows.name: glow
shadows.purpose: Engaged lime elements only; glow is earned by interaction state.

shadows.name: premium
shadows.purpose: Modals and the floating header when scrolled.

motion.name: ease-premium
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions.

motion.name: ease-bounce-soft
motion.purpose: Playful entrances (icon hop, scale-in); use sparingly.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The lime CTA: one per view, navy text, lifts and glows on hover.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary">Join the waitlist<svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14"/><path d="m12 5 7 7-7 7"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #C0DC2D; color: #13243E; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; padding: 12px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 300ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #c4e538; transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.02); box-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(192,220,45,0.4); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #fafaf9, 0 0 0 4px rgba(192,220,45,0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0) scale(0.98); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Navy surface button for supporting actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #1a2942; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; padding: 12px 24px; border: 1px solid #2d4a6f; border-radius: 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 300ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #2d4a6f; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -5px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #fafaf9, 0 0 0 4px rgba(192,220,45,0.5); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Lime-outlined tertiary action on dark surfaces.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: transparent; color: #C0DC2D; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; padding: 12px 24px; border: 2px solid rgba(192,220,45,0.5); border-radius: 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 300ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: rgba(192,220,45,0.1); border-color: #C0DC2D; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(192,220,45,0.3); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #0a1628, 0 0 0 4px rgba(192,220,45,0.5); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Default white card with resting shadow; lifts only when clickable.
components.html:
Mira answers in seconds

Pricing, stock, sizes, and delivery. Your customers get a reply even when you're asleep.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #f3f4f6; border-radius: 20px; padding: 32px; max-width: 360px; box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 4px 6px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); transition: all 400ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -5px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 10px 10px -5px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); transform: translateY(-8px); } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', sans-serif; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 600; color: #13243E; margin: 0 0 12px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.6; color: #2d4a6f; margin: 0; }

components.name: Floating Label Input
components.description: Translucent input with floating label that turns lime on focus (dark-surface context).
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { position: relative; background: #0f172a; padding: 8px; border-radius: 20px; max-width: 320px; } .ds-input { width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border-radius: 16px; padding: 22px 16px 10px; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 16px; transition: all 300ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: rgba(192,220,45,0.5); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(192,220,45,0.2); } .ds-input-label { position: absolute; left: 24px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); color: #94adc9; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 16px; pointer-events: none; transition: all 300ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-input:focus + .ds-input-label, .ds-input:not(:placeholder-shown) + .ds-input-label { top: 18px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: #C0DC2D; }

components.name: Trust Badge
components.description: Soft tinted informational chip; never interactive, never glowing at rest.
components.html: Your data stays yours
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: linear-gradient(to right, #ecfdf5, rgba(209,250,229,0.5)); border: 1px solid rgba(110,231,183,0.3); border-radius: 16px; padding: 12px 16px; color: #065f46; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Nav Pill
components.description: Floating pill header links: small, rounded-full, tint on hover.
components.html: How it worksPricingJoin the waitlist
components.css: .ds-nav { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 6px; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); } .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #2d4a6f; text-decoration: none; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 9999px; transition: all 300ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: #f5f5f4; color: #13243E; } .ds-nav-link-active { color: #13243E; background: #f5f5f4; } .ds-nav-cta { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #13243E; background: #C0DC2D; text-decoration: none; padding: 8px 20px; border-radius: 9999px; transition: all 300ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-nav-cta:hover { background: #c4e538; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(192,220,45,0.3); }

narrative.overview: Mira's interface feels like a capable friend behind the counter: warm light surfaces, plain talk, and one bright lime signal that says "Mira is on." The system is built for Kenyan Instagram sellers on phones, so warmth never comes at the cost of clarity, and every surface earns trust through specifics (a real DM transcript doing commerce) rather than claims. Bricolage Grotesque gives headlines a friendly, characterful confidence; IBM Plex Sans keeps the body grounded and legible; JetBrains Mono appears in small doses where the product shows its working. The system explicitly rejects the generic SaaS landing, corporate enterprise sobriety, Silicon Valley AI hype, and the cheap template look.
keyCharacteristics: Warm, capable, grounded; a teammate, not a tool
One accent: Fresh Lime does the signaling, everything else stays calm
DM-native: chat transcripts and commerce moments are the hero visuals
Mobile-first density, generous touch targets, friendly tactile components
Layered depth with glow reserved for state, not decoration

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Fresh Lime is the only color allowed to shout. It marks what Mira is doing or what the visitor should do next, never decoration. If lime covers more than ~10% of a screen, something is wrong.

rules.name: The Lime-on-Navy Rule
rules.body: Fresh Lime text or icons sit on navy; navy text sits on lime. Lime on white and white on lime are both forbidden (contrast failures).

rules.name: The One Display Rule
rules.body: Exactly one display-scale element per page, in the hero. Everything else steps down through the scale; competing displays cancel each other out.

rules.name: The Glow-Earns-Its-Keep Rule
rules.body: Lime glow appears only on interactive elements in an engaged state (hover, focus, active). A glowing static badge is prohibited.

dos: Do reserve Fresh Lime (#C0DC2D) for the one thing that matters on each screen: the CTA, the active state, the "Mira is on" signal.
Do pair lime exclusively with navy: navy text on lime fills, lime icons on navy surfaces.
Do show a believable DM transcript doing commerce wherever the product needs proving; demonstrations over adjectives.
Do keep touch targets ≥44px and test every section at 320px width; the audience is on phones.
Do give every animation a prefers-reduced-motion: reduce alternative and keep motion on transform/opacity.
Do verify both themes independently hit WCAG AA contrast (navy-mist #94adc9 is dark-theme-only for body text).
donts: Don't build the "generic SaaS landing": gradient blobs, hero-metric blocks, identical icon-heading-text card grids (PRODUCT.md anti-reference).
Don't drift "corporate enterprise": dense jargon, navy-suit sobriety, Salesforce/IBM energy (PRODUCT.md anti-reference).
Don't touch "Silicon Valley AI hype": neon-glow dark mode as default, sparkle motifs, "magic" framing (PRODUCT.md anti-reference).
Don't ship the "cheap template look": default Bootstrap/ThemeForest patterns that undercut the trust ask (PRODUCT.md anti-reference).
Don't apply glow, shimmer, or float animations to static elements; glow is earned by interaction state.
Don't use gradient text, side-stripe borders, or glassmorphism as default card chrome.
Don't put lime on white or white on lime; both fail contrast.
Don't use exclamation points or banned vocabulary ("AI-powered", "streamline", "our platform") anywhere in UI copy; see docs/voice-and-tone.md.
